_doc: Manual MLB-equivalent projections for international debutants with no FanGraphs/Chadwick history. Loaded by compute_erosp.py Step 13b and merged into latest.json only if the player is absent from the main pipeline output. Delete or comment out a player entry once the main pipeline can resolve them (typically after 20+ PA or 5+ IP of FanGraphs YTD data).
_npb_translation: All rate stats are already translated to MLB equivalents using the NPB->MLB adjustment factor (approximately 0.88 for offensive production: avg/obp/slg scale down ~12%, K rate scales up ~15%, ERA scales up ~14%). Do NOT double-apply this factor in code.

players.name: Munetaka Murakami
players._source: NPB 3yr weighted (0.60/0.25/0.15): 2024 .244/.435/~.533 33HR, 2023 .256/.375/.500 31HR, 2022 .318/.458/.710 56HR. MLB translation x0.88; K rate adjusted x1.18 for stronger MLB pitching; HR retention ~88% of weighted rate. MLBAM 808959 confirmed (mlb.com). ESPN ID 4872595 confirmed (espn.com).

players.name: Tatsuya Imai
players._source: NPB 3yr weighted (0.60/0.25/0.15): 2025 1.92 ERA/178K/163.7IP/0.89WHIP, 2024 2.34 ERA/187K/173.1IP/1.17WHIP, 2023 2.30 ERA/130K/133IP/1.11WHIP. MLB translation: ERA /0.88, K/9 x0.88, BB/9 /0.88, H/9 /0.88. MLBAM 837227 confirmed (mlb.com/player/tatsuya-imai-837227). ESPN ID 5330833 confirmed (espn.com/mlb/player/_/id/5330833). Signed HOU 3yr $54M Jan 2026.

players.name: Kazuma Okamoto
players._source: NPB career .277 avg 248 HR in 11 seasons (2015-2025), 6x All-Star, led CL in HR 2020/2021/2023. 2025 final: .327/15HR in 69G. 3yr weighted NPB: ~.286/.360/.515 ~0.046 HR/PA. MLB translation x0.88; K rate adjusted x1.15. MLBAM 672960 confirmed (mlb.com/bluejays/player/kazuma-okamoto-672960). ESPN ID 5134636 confirmed (espn.com/mlb/player/_/id/5134636). Signed TOR 4yr $60M Jan 2026.
